rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FRANK ANTHONY ALIOTO REVOCABLE TRUST, RESTATED AND TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
rulings.Rulings: continued to december 20, 2016. notice is not proper as there is no proof of service of DE-120, a mandatory form for probate petitions. in addition, no file stamped hard copy of the petition and no proposed order delivered to the examiner in Room 202 (faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted). finally, the supervising judge has reviewed the consolidation issue and determined the matter must proceed under the original case number, so Counsel must either file an ex parte petition to consolidate the matters or take this petition off calendar and re-file under the original case number. depending on Counsel's decision, courtesy copies of the objections and memorandum must also be provided no later than 3 court days prior to the continued hearing date.
